title: OpenCode Qwen estimator CLI core
description: Implement a dependency-free Node ESM estimator CLI for an OpenCode Qwen estimate workflow.
goals: Capture intake and normalize legacy request data
Classify, reference-class, estimate, render, review, and calibrate the result
constraints: Fail closed when file paths escape the selected root
Keep JSON parse and size errors bounded
flows: DF-CLI-01: request JSON is normalized into estimate intake
BF-EST-01: evidence packet is classified before effort is rendered

priorRuns.label: Small ESM CLI with tests
priorRuns.notes: Included path and JSON error coverage
